name: system.agent.activate
description:
Activate a core or custom agent, persisting the enabled state.
Parameters: id (required).

name: system.agent.create
description: Create a new custom agent with personality, model, tools, and configuration.

name: system.agent.deactivate
description:
Deactivate an agent (makes it unavailable for new sessions), persisting the disabled state.
Parameters: id (required).

name: system.agent.delete
description:
Delete an agent and all its data (sessions, memory, workspace).
Parameters: id (required), confirm (bool, must be true).

name: system.agent.list
description:
List all agents with their status, model, and task count.
Parameters: status (optional: active/inactive/all, default all).

name: system.agent.update
description: Update an existing agent's configuration. Only provided fields are changed; omitted fields are left as-is.

name: system.backup.create
description: Create a backup of the Omnipus data directory. Parameters: encrypt (bool, default false).

name: system.channel.configure
description:
Configure an enabled channel with its credentials (token, phone_number, etc).
Parameters: id (required), plus channel-specific credentials.

name: system.channel.disable
description: Disable a channel. Parameters: id (required).

name: system.channel.enable
description:
Enable a channel so it can be configured and connected.
Parameters: id (required).

name: system.channel.list
description: List all channels with status and implementation tier. No parameters required.

name: system.channel.test
description: Test a channel connection. Parameters: id (required).

name: system.config.get
description:
Read a configuration value by dot-notation key.
Parameters: key (required, e.g. 'gateway.port').

name: system.config.set
description:
Update a configuration value.
Parameters: key (required), value (required).

name: system.cost.query
description: Query LLM cost data by period. Parameters: period (today/week/month/custom), start_date, end_date, agent_id, group_by.

name: system.doctor.run
description: Run security diagnostics and return a risk score (0-100) with actionable recommendations. No parameters required.

name: system.mcp.add
description:
Add an MCP server.
Parameters: name (required), transport (stdio/sse/http), command, args, url, env, agent_ids.

name: system.mcp.list
description: List all MCP servers with status and assigned agents. No parameters required.

name: system.mcp.remove
description: Remove an MCP server. Parameters: name (required), confirm (bool, must be true).

name: system.models.list
description: List available models from configured providers. Optional: filter by provider name. Returns model slugs, provider, and whether it's the system default.

name: system.navigate
description:
Navigate the UI to a specific screen.
Parameters: screen (chat/command-center/agents/skills/settings), agent_id (optional), section (optional).

name: system.pin.create
description:
Pin a chat response.
Parameters: session_id (required), message_id (required), title, tags, project_id.

name: system.pin.delete
description: Delete a pin. Parameters: id (required), confirm (bool, must be true).

name: system.pin.list
description:
List pinned artifacts with optional filters.
Parameters: agent_id, project_id, tags, search (all optional).

name: system.project.create
description:
Create a new project.
Parameters: name (required), description, color, agent_ids.

name: system.project.delete
description: Delete a project. Parameters: id (required), confirm (bool, must be true).

name: system.project.list
description: List all projects with task counts. No parameters required.

name: system.project.update
description:
Update an existing project.
Parameters: id (required), name, description, color, agent_ids.

name: system.provider.configure
description:
Add or update an LLM provider with its API key.
Parameters: name (required), api_key (for cloud), api_base (optional).

name: system.provider.list
description: List configured providers with connection status. API keys are never returned. No parameters required.

name: system.provider.test
description: Test a provider connection. Parameters: name (required).

name: system.skill.install
description:
Install a skill from ClawHub.
Parameters: name (required), agent_ids (optional), credentials (optional).

name: system.skill.list
description: List all installed skills. No parameters required.

name: system.skill.remove
description: Remove an installed skill. Parameters: name (required), confirm (bool, must be true).

name: system.skill.search
description:
Search ClawHub for skills.
Parameters: query (required), sort (trending/new/popular), limit.

name: system.task.create
description:
Create a task on the GTD board.
Parameters: name (required), description, project_id, agent_id, status (inbox/next/active/waiting/done).

name: system.task.delete
description: Delete a task. Parameters: id (required), confirm (bool, must be true).

name: system.task.list
description:
List tasks with optional filters.
Parameters: project_id, agent_id, status (all optional).

name: system.task.update
description:
Update a task's status, assignment, or details.
Parameters: id (required), name, description, status, agent_id, project_id.
